message:
test(resize): add 16 cross-module integration tests for pressure→budget pipeline (wa-1u90p.7.1)

Validates the full memory-pressure-to-resize-action chain: tier monotonicity
properties (batch size, scratch bytes, overscan, backlog all decrease with
stricter pressure), effective value capping under low remaining counts,
scratch allocation coherence at all tiers, pressure oscillation statelesness,
custom aggressive configs, and metric accounting consistency.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
